title: Spicy American Stuffed Tomatoes
description: A flavorful and healthy vegetarian recipe that combines the sweetness of tomatoes with the spiciness of American cheese.
instructions: Cut the tops off the tomatoes and scoop out the insides.
In a bowl, mix together the American cheese, breadcrumbs, paprika, garlic powder, and salt.
Stuff each tomato with the cheese mixture.
Place the stuffed tomatoes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve warm.
